docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-08-2025 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-15-2025 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 BY VISITING JUDGE TAMILA IPEMA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF CHRISTIAN ANTHONY SALONGA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BUNGALOW LIVING, INC. IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,300.00 FILED BY SALONGA, CHRISTIAN ANTHONY AS TO DEFENDANT BUNGALOW LIVING, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-08-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE RE: PROOF OF SERVICE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $ 75.00 SERVED AUG-25-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BUNGALOW LIVING, INC.
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM. FILED BY DEFENDANT BUNGALOW LIVING, INC.
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM GRANTED. FILED BY DEFENDANT BUNGALOW LIVING, INC.
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM GRANTED*** BY REQUEST OF DEFENDANT.
REMARK: DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED VIA MAIL.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-15-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-15-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE CINDEE MAYFIELD. PLAINTIFF CHRISTIAN ANTHONY SALONGA APPEARED. DEFENDANT BUNGALOW LIVING, INC APPEARED VIA ZOOM, REPRESENTED BY LEANN CAMERON, DIRECTOR OF PORTFOLIO OPS. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE CINDEE MAYFIELD, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-15-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SALONGA, CHRISTIAN ANTHONY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BUNGALOW LIVING, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
